name: iclr-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR) submissions: topic fit, OpenReview submission checks, author discussion, camera-ready, artifacts, reproducibility, supplementary material, review process, writing style, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in official ICLR 2026 CFP, Author Guide, Reviewer Guide, Code of Ethics, and LLM policy checked on 2026-06-01.
